title: rubus perfulvus
intro: Rubus perfulvus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus perfulvus include its potential to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Rubus perfulvus can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support overall health and well-being.
